steps.title: Find the absolute increase in the bill
steps.content:
Subtract the original bill from the new bill:
\$79.86 - \$75.74 = \$4.12

steps.title: Calculate the percent increase and round
steps.content:
$$\frac{4.12}{75.74} \times 100\% \approx 5.44\%$$
Rounding to the nearest tenth of a percent gives 5.4%. That matches choice D — D is correct.
